description_long: This is a thick, ornate book with a dark wooden cover, reinforced by gold metal corner plates and a black metal clasp. The front cover is adorned with two large, twisted black horns and a central, round blue gem set in a gold decorative mount, giving it a mystical or arcane appearance. The spine is cylindrical and bound with additional gold rivets, while the back cover is plain wood with matching gold corner protectors. The pages are visible from the side, appearing aged and yellowed. The book's overall design suggests it is a magical or ceremonial tome, possibly used for rituals or as a collector's item. The craftsmanship is detailed, with a mix of natural and metallic textures.
description: A thick, wooden book with gold metal accents, black horns, and a blue gem centerpiece, exuding a mystical, arcane vibe.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical spine, gold rivets, and one prominent black horn curving outward.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the ornate cover with two black horns, a central blue gem, and gold corner plates.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the exposed, aged pages and gold corner protectors.
description_view_3: Back view revealing a plain wooden cover with gold corners and the black clasp mechanism.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features two large, twisted black horns emerging from a gold decorative mount, with a prominent blue gem set at the center. The design is highly ornamental and mystical, with no pictorial illustration but rather a focus on sculptural, fantasy-inspired elements.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is cylindrical, made of dark wood with gold rivets and bands, and lacks any visible text or pictorial decoration. Its design is robust and ornamental, matching the book's overall arcane theme.
